name: SPARX Group Co., Ltd.
summary: SPARX Group Co., Ltd. is a publicly owned asset management holding company. Through its subsidiaries, the firm offers asset management and investment advisory services. It invests in real estate. The firm primarily provides its services to corporate pension annuities, government entities, private and trust banks, and public pension funds. SPARX Group Co., Ltd. was founded on July 1, 1989 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.
